CHAR 1 This column indicates whether the staff or provider notified that there is a potential for self-harm. -=Not assessed/no information
0=No
1=Yes
^=Blank(skip pattern) discontinued 9/30/2019
160 E0100A_HLLCNTN_CD E0100A_HLLCNTN_CD E0100A Behavior: Hallucinations Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident is experiencing hallucinations. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Not checked (No)
1=Checked (Yes)
^=Blank (skip pattern)
161 E0100B_DLSN_CD E0100B_DLSN_CD
